violations.description: Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
violations.help: ARIA role should be appropriate for the element

violations.description: Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require child roles contain them
violations.help: Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children

violations.description: Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require parent roles are contained by them
violations.help: Certain ARIA roles must be contained by particular parents

violations.description: Ensure all elements with a role attribute use a valid value
violations.help: ARIA roles used must conform to valid values

violations.description: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct
violations.help: Heading levels should only increase by one
<li> elements must be contained in a <ul> or <ol>

violations.description: Ensure <meta name="viewport"> can scale a significant amount
violations.help: Users should be able to zoom and scale the text up to 500%

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks
